# TaskIt!

TaskIt is a free, open-source, self-hosted task manager for individuals, households, and small teams.

## Core positioning
- Self-hosted task management with privacy-first deployment
- Optional gamification: XP, achievements, streaks, Freeze Credits, titles, friends, and leaderboards
- Built-in support for recurring tasks, sporadic maintenance tasks, and long-term goals
- Group collaboration with assignments, progress notes, and secure invite links / QR codes
- Private ICS calendar feeds plus per-task email/browser reminders

## Public pages
- Landing page: https://taskit.jahosi.co.uk/
- User guide: https://taskit.jahosi.co.uk/user-guide.html
- Deployment guide: https://taskit.jahosi.co.uk/howto.html
- Privacy policy: https://taskit.jahosi.co.uk/privacy-policy.html

## Accuracy notes
- TaskIt installs as a PWA, but live task data still requires a connection to the hosted server
- Gamification is opt-in, not mandatory
- TaskIt is free and open source, with no subscription tier
